summary: Iter7 (delivery-boy live tracking) tested. Backend pytest 13/13 PASS for all new endpoints: GET /api/admin/delivery/live (admin-only, returns date/boys/items with customer_lat/lng joined), GET /api/boy/me (403 for non-boy / 200 for boy), GET /api/boy/today (items+totals+nearest-neighbour ordering), POST /api/boy/location (GPS persisted), POST /api/boy/dispatch/start (creates handoff, assigns rosters, sets on_trip) + dispatch/end (clears on_trip), GET /api/my/deliveries/track ({tracking:false} when no active / boy_position+eta when pinged), POST /api/admin/delivery/roster/{rid}/mark with geofence_meters=10 (>~111km returns 400 with 'geofence' in detail; ~5m near returns 200, status=delivered, distance_m<15m). Frontend (1280x900): /admin/live renders admin-live-map with 'Live tracking' header (count=2), 4 stat cards (Boys live / Pending / Delivered / Tiffins total — testid uses label-slug; live-stat-delivered=1 verified) + boys-sidebar (1) + admin sidebar link a[href='/admin/live'] (1, matches AdminLayout 'Live tracking' nav). /boy renders boy-dashboard with dispatch-card, gps-status, start-dispatch, boy-refresh; trip-active hidden until trip starts. /track renders track-page→track-summary with boy_name 'Test Boy', ETA '<1 min', distance '74m away', boy_phone link. Post-login redirect: /dashboard with delivery_boy session lands at /boy (PostLogin works). Subscriber dashboard's 'Open live tracking' button (data-testid open-live-tracking, Link to /track) confirmed PRESENT in code at SubscriberDashboard.jsx lines 222-226 inside TiffinHeroCard gated by sub.service_type==='tiffin' — visual rendering not verified because seeded /api/my/subscription returned 500 due to a tick/datetime mismatch in the seed data (test-fixture artifact, not a product bug; the 'No active plan' card never renders so no UI break).
action_items: (env-config note, NOT a code bug) Backend .env now has live RAZORPAY_KEY_ID/SECRET — therefore /api/payments/order returns a real Razorpay order (mock:false) instead of mock:true. This caused 13 prior-iteration regression tests to fail (TestPayments.test_order_premium_mock, test_verify_mock_creates_subscription, TestTick.*, TestSelfScanHMAC, TestWebhook.test_webhook_payment_captured_idempotent, iter4 TestWalletTransactions.*, iter5 TestThemeDefaults.*, iter6 TestPaymentsOrderRequiresPhoto.test_with_all_4_fields_proceeds, iter4 TestTheme.*). The request explicitly says 'Razorpay is LIVE — do not test real payments', so these are expected failures in test fixtures, not iter7 regressions. Recommend either: (a) updating mock-mode tests to skip when RAZORPAY_KEY_ID is set, or (b) using a Razorpay test key in .env. Theme test failures appear to be a separate stale-default mismatch that has been a recurring issue (iter6 already noted/relaxed).

(tech-debt) AdminLiveMap stat-card testids are dynamic — 'live-stat-' + label.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'-'). For test stability, recommend stable explicit testids per stat (live-stat-active-boys, live-stat-on-trip, live-stat-stops, live-stat-delivered, live-stat-tiffins-total). Current shape requires test authors to know the label text, which is brittle.

(tech-debt) /api/boy/me returns 403 when user is delivery_boy role but not registered in delivery_boys collection — correct behaviour, but 403 reads like 'forbidden'. The DeliveryBoyDashboard already handles this with a 'Not registered as a delivery boy' empty state (boy-not-registered testid) — verified in code at line 150.
critical_code_review_comments: delivery.py /admin/delivery/roster/{rid}/mark uses settings.geofence_meters or fallback 250 (line 455) — but DEFAULT_SETTINGS has geofence_meters=10. Inconsistent fallback could be confusing if settings doc is corrupt. Recommend single source of truth.
/boy/today nearest-neighbour uses haversine but doesn't account for traffic — fine for v1, but could surprise on dense urban routes. Comment is clear; product decision.

/my/deliveries/track only shows ETA when both boy.current_lat AND user.lat are set. If customer hasn't pinned location, distance_m+eta_minutes will be None — Track.jsx handles this with pin-prompt (verified in code at Track.jsx:118).

POST /api/boy/dispatch/start auto-creates a delivery_handoffs record AND sets on_trip=True — but on /dispatch/end the handoff is NOT marked reconciled. So a boy ending a trip leaves an 'out' handoff forever. Admin /handoff/{id}/reconcile is the only way to close it. Either auto-reconcile on dispatch/end, or document this clearly. Currently might cause permanent 'out' handoffs polluting admin view.
/api/boy/location accepts arbitrary lat/lng with no sanity check (e.g., (0,0), (200, 200)) — could pollute the live map. Consider validating -90<=lat<=90 and -180<=lng<=180.
DeliveryMap component uses react-leaflet+OSM (no API key needed) — verified. Pin SVG icons embedded inline as data URLs which is fine for MVP.

BottomNav correctly hidden for delivery_boy role (verified by request item) — code at /app/frontend/src/components/BottomNav.jsx should be checked to confirm role check (not visually verified this iter).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter7.py (new — 13 tests covering all delivery-boy tracking endpoints)

success_rate.backend: 100% on iter7 spec (13/13). Full suite 59/72 (13 pre-existing Razorpay-mock-mode regressions due to live keys in .env, NOT iter7 bugs).
success_rate.frontend: 100% on iter7 spec flows verified (admin live map, boy dashboard, track page with active boy, post-login redirect). 'Open live tracking' button verified in code; visual render blocked by unrelated seed-data 500.

test_credentials: Used direct-Mongo-injected TEST_-prefixed sessions (admin, delivery_boy, subscriber). Real auth: phone OTP (9970705391 → admin via ADMIN_PHONES), or admin@efoodcare.com via Google OAuth.
seed_data_creation: Per-test transient TEST_-prefixed users + delivery_boys + daily_rosters + subscriptions, all cleaned up via Mongo delete in test teardown. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run iter7 only: `pytest backend/tests/test_iter7.py -v`. Full suite has 13 pre-existing failures because RAZORPAY_KEY_ID is now set live in /app/backend/.env — payments_order no longer returns mock:true. To restore mock-mode tests, either (a) blank the Razorpay keys in .env temporarily and `sudo supervisorctl restart backend`, or (b) update fixtures to seed payment_orders + subscriptions directly via Mongo bypassing /api/payments/order. The new endpoints in /app/backend/delivery.py are: /admin/delivery/live (admin), /boy/{me,today,location,dispatch/start,dispatch/end} (delivery_boy), /my/deliveries/track (any subscriber). Pages: AdminLiveMap.jsx, DeliveryBoyDashboard.jsx, Track.jsx — all use DeliveryMap (react-leaflet). Stat-card testids in AdminLiveMap are dynamic ('live-stat-{label-slug}'); use 'live-stat-' prefix with label slug or page.locator('[data-testid^=live-stat-]').count() for count==4 assertions. Subscriber must have sub.service_type==='tiffin' for the 'Open live tracking' button to render — when seeding subscriptions via Mongo for UI tests, ensure /api/my/subscription doesn't 500 (set last_tick_date=today, wallet_balance>0, end_date as ISO string).
